description: Root PROTOCOL_DAILY_ANALYSIS.md and agents/aether/PROTOCOL_DAILY_ANALYSIS.md are separate physical files. Only agents/aether/ version was updated to v2.5; root copy stayed at v2.4. Hyo opened root copy from Finder and saw stale version, creating confusion about whether the protocol had been updated.
prevention: Root copy is now a symlink to agents/aether/ — one physical file, impossible to drift. kai_analysis.py injects protocol at startup. KNOWLEDGE.md and CLAUDE.md document the rule.
gate_question: Is PROTOCOL_DAILY_ANALYSIS.md at root a symlink (ls -la)? NO → stop and fix before any protocol update.
resolution: Symlink confirmed: PROTOCOL_DAILY_ANALYSIS.md -> agents/aether/PROTOCOL_DAILY_ANALYSIS.md (lrwxr-xr-x). Single physical file. Task #16 completed 2026-04-18.

description: Duplicate const declaration in renderAnt() (hq.html) — two const incomeStreams in same function scope caused SyntaxError crashing entire Ant tab
detection: Hyo reported Ant site not working. Console check: SyntaxError: Identifier 'incomeStreams' has already been declared at line 2987
fix: Removed second declaration. Use already-declared variable from earlier in scope.
prevention_gate: After any hq.html edit: open browser console, navigate to Ant tab, confirm no SyntaxError before declaring done. Gate question: 'Did I add any const/let/var that might already exist in the same function scope?'
resolution: Verified 2026-04-21: only one const incomeStreams in hq.html (line 2769). Duplicate was already removed in prior session.

description: Daily audit (2026-04-22): kai/queue/daily-audit.sh defaults HYO_ROOT to $HOME/Documents/Projects/Hyo — when run by scheduled task without HYO_ROOT set it resolves to /sessions/clever-nice-cerf/Documents/Projects/Hyo (dead path), reports all 5 agents FAIL, and writes the report to an unreachable location. The scheduled-task runner at kai/queue/com.hyo.daily-audit.plist (or equivalent) must export HYO_ROOT=/Users/kai/Documents/Projects/Hyo before invoking, OR the script should fall back to its own location via dirname. Self-sabotaging audit — fix before next 22:00 MT run.
